purpose: This repository provides the database model and context for a lending and selling system within a financial services application. It defines entities, relationships, and database operations for managing loans, accounts, fees, transfers, and other financial transactions in a multi-tenant architecture.

dataEntities.name: Account
dataEntities.description: Represents financial accounts in the system

dataEntities.name: Loan
dataEntities.description: Core entity representing loan products with their characteristics

dataEntities.name: Investor
dataEntities.description: Entity representing investors who purchase loans

dataEntities.name: Transfer
dataEntities.description: Represents transfers of loans between accounts or entities

dataEntities.name: Fee
dataEntities.description: Represents various fees applied to loans or accounts

dataEntities.name: InterestHistory
dataEntities.description: Tracks historical interest calculations for loans

dataEntities.name: Mpl
dataEntities.description: Mortgage Program Lending configuration and details

dataEntities.name: Batch
dataEntities.description: Batch operations for processing multiple records

dataEntities.name: LoanEvent
dataEntities.description: Events that occur during loan lifecycle

messagingPatterns.name: BatchInitOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for batch initialization messages

messagingPatterns.name: DailyInterestOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for daily interest calculation messages

messagingPatterns.name: FeeOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for fee processing messages

messagingPatterns.name: TransferOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for transfer operation messages

messagingPatterns.name: VolumeFeeOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for volume fee calculation messages

messagingPatterns.name: ReportingOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Outbox pattern for reporting data messages

findings.title: Multiple dead letter queues without handling mechanism
findings.description: The repository contains multiple dead letter entities (e.g., BatchInitOutboxDeadLetter, FeeOutboxDeadLetter) but lacks visible mechanisms for handling or processing these dead letters. This could lead to unprocessed messages and system inconsistencies. Implement a dead letter processing strategy or monitoring system.

findings.title: Multi-tenant data access control lacks clear enforcement
findings.description: While there's a tenant authorization structure in place, the repository doesn't show clear enforcement mechanisms for tenant-based data isolation in database queries. This could potentially allow data leakage between tenants. Implement consistent tenant filtering in all data access queries.
